construct_definition: A focused test construct representing AI-related anxiety responses across a bridge item set before scored promotion.
intended_scored_use: This under-review artifact records incomplete independent review and must not authorize scored promotion or psychometric promotion review.
target_population: US adults completing an English-language online ANX-Bench validation survey.

domain_facets.facet_definition: Sleep disruption and difficulty settling after exposure to AI capability information.

reviewer_panel.independence_rule: Reviewers did not draft the items, manage fielding, or hold release authority; ratings are still being collected.

reviewers.conflict_of_interest_statement: No item authorship, fielding role, or release authority.

reviewers.expertise_area: AI risk communication and public understanding
reviewers.conflict_of_interest_statement: No item authorship, fielding role, or release authority.

reviewer_ratings.comments: Initial rating is acceptable, but the panel is incomplete.

scale_level_cvi.calculation_rule: Overall item CVI is provisional during review and cannot support scored promotion until three independent reviewers complete ratings.

revision_decisions.decision_rationale: The item remains under content-validity review and has not received full panel resolution.

promotion_eligibility.eligibility_statement: The dossier remains under review and cannot support scored promotion until the full independent panel and flag resolution are complete.

signoff.signoff_statement: No content-validity signoff has been completed because review is still in progress.
